hero.subtitle: We design and develop modern websites that help brands grow online. Clean, fast, and built to convert.

about.desc1: Aurexa is a freelance web design and development studio focused on crafting beautiful, functional and result-driven websites. We help businesses establish a strong online presence with modern, responsive designs.
about.desc2: From concept to launch, we work closely with our clients to deliver websites that not only look stunning but also perform exceptionally across all devices.

services.name: Web Design
services.desc: Beautiful & modern UI/UX design that captivates visitors and creates memorable digital experiences for your brand.

services.name: Web Development
services.desc: Fast, secure & scalable websites built with modern technologies. Clean code that performs and scales with your business.

services.name: Responsive Design
services.desc: Perfect on all devices — from desktops to tablets to mobile phones. Your site will look flawless everywhere.

services.name: Website Maintenance
services.desc: Ongoing support & updates to keep your website running smoothly, secure, and up-to-date with the latest standards.
